scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter llm-chat-server dev" "pnpm --filter llm-chat-web dev"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -k -n mock,server,web -c magenta,cyan,green "pnpm --filter llm-chat-server mock" "cross-env LLM_BASE_URL=http://localhost:9000/v1 LLM_API_KEY=mock pnpm --filter llm-chat-server dev" "pnpm --filter llm-chat-web dev"
